counter_user_alias.description: The label of the user to share with.

access_type.description: Type of access that is in place.

draft_share_invite_bank_id.description: DEPRECATED: USE `access_type` INSTEAD | The id of the draft share invite bank.

share_detail.description: DEPRECATED: USE `access_type` INSTEAD | The share details. Only one of these objects may be passed.

status.description: The status of the share. Can be ACTIVE, REVOKED, REJECTED.

share_type.description: DEPRECATED: USE `access_type` INSTEAD | The share type, either STANDARD or MUTUAL.

start_date.description: DEPRECATED: USE `access_type` INSTEAD | The start date of this share.

end_date.description: DEPRECATED: USE `access_type` INSTEAD | The expiration date of this share.

alias.description: The label of the monetary account that's being shared.

user_alias_created.description: The user who created the share.

user_alias_revoked.description: The user who revoked the share.

monetary_account_id.description: The id of the monetary account the share applies to.

id.description: The id of the newly created share invite.
